summary: Verified new nested-manufacturing shortcut UX in produce dialog. Login → /warehouse-manufacturing → tab-manufacturing → produce-btn for 'جارلك مايو'. With produce-quantity raised so recipe demand (8+ كغم) exceeds مايونيز stock (2 كغم), the green emerald-styled [data-testid=produce-mfg-shortfall] block appears with header '🏭 1 منتج مُصنّع ناقص — صنّعه أولاً', shows مايونيز row with 'ناقص' red badge ('مطلوب: 18 كغم متوفر: 2 كغم'), and contains green button [data-testid=produce-sub-btn-mayo-demo] labeled 'صنّع مايونيز الآن' (bg rgb(5,150,105) = emerald-600). Clicking the button correctly switches the produce dialog: title changes from 'تصنيع: جارلك مايو' to 'تصنيع: مايونيز' and produce-quantity-input resets to 1. The raw-material [data-testid=auto-request-short-materials-btn] is correctly NOT rendered since the shortage is on a manufactured (not raw) ingredient. All 4 acceptance checks PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: Pre-existing /api/branches 403 for admin still logs console errors on /warehouse-manufacturing (carried over from iter196-202). Not blocking this feature.

At default produce-quantity=1 the recipe auto-scales mayo requirement down to ~1 كغم (≤ 2 available) so mfg-shortfall block hides — this is correct behavior. The feature only triggers once user-entered quantity creates a real shortfall, matching the seeded ‘need 8 / have 2’ scenario at qty≥1 of the base recipe.

produce-mfg-shortfall block is rendered inside the produce-dialog content tree and properly per-item; each row has [data-testid=produce-sub-btn-{manufactured_product_id}] template, allowing easy multi-sub-product extension.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeds: mayo-demo (qty=2 كغم, manufactured) and garlicmayo-demo (recipe needs مايونيز 8 كغم). No modifications.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature lives in /app/frontend/src/pages/WarehouseManufacturing.js ~L6092-6123. mfgShort array drives [data-testid=produce-mfg-shortfall] (emerald container). Each entry renders a row with [data-testid=produce-sub-btn-{manufactured_product_id}]; onClick does setShowProduceDialog(subProduct); setProduceQuantity(1); setActualYield(''). To reproduce: click produce-btn for جارلك مايو, then set produce-quantity-input to a value that makes 8*qty > mayo.quantity (default qty=1 keeps it within stock so block hides — must raise qty). Note: تصنيع tab testid is [data-testid=tab-manufacturing]; the produce button selector is shared [data-testid=produce-btn] across cards so locate the card by direct ownText match on the product name then querySelector inside that ancestor.
